title: Visa and OpenAI integrate Visa's secure global payment directly into ChatGPT
description: Would you hand an AI chatbot your credit card? This week, Visa's deal with ChatGPT maker OpenAI became the latest step in the march toward a future where AI offers to shop on your behalf.
text: This week, Visa's deal with ChatGPT maker OpenAI became the latest step in the march toward a future where AI offers to shop on your behalf. A MARTÍNEZ, Major AI companies are picturing a future where people share credit card information with chatbots and then trust those bots to become personal shoppers. NPR's Alina Selyukh explores the next frontier of shopping. ALINA SELYUKH, One analogy for where we are now in the arc of shopping with AI was offered recently by the CEO of Amazon. SELYUKH: Emily Pfeiffer is a principal analyst at Forrester, where she advises retailers and brands on digital commerce strategy, which includes AI. PFEIFFER: A lot of my job right now is saying, everything's OK. SELYUKH: And so even among confident users of AI, people tend to mostly use it like I did - to research and compare different options. If you think about how often people abandon their shopping carts on established shopping websites, Pfeiffer says it's even worse with chatbots.
thai_text: ข่าวนี้จาก NPR อยู่ในหมวดธุรกิจและเศรษฐกิจ หัวข้อคือ “Visa and OpenAI integrate Visa's secure global payment directly into ChatGPT”. ใจความหลักคือ This week, Visa's deal with ChatGPT maker OpenAI became the latest step in the march toward a future where AI offers to shop on your behalf. A MARTÍNEZ, Major AI companies are picturing a future where people share credit card information with chatbots and then trust those bots to become personal shoppers. NPR's Alina Selyukh explores the next frontier of shopping. ALINA SELYUKH, One analogy for where we are now in the arc of shopping with AI was offered recently by the CEO of Amazon. สรุปง่าย ๆ คือข่าวนี้เล่าว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้น ใครเกี่ยวข้อง และทำไมเรื่องนี้จึงควรติดตามต่อ. คำสำคัญที่ควรรู้: abandon = คำว่า abandon / advises = คำว่า advises / ai = ปัญญาประดิษฐ์ / alina = คำว่า alina / amazon = คำว่า amazon.
